entry.value: Class: Rule Id/Name: Validation-plancompilation Action: run in Debug Object Browser by User spadmin

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?> <!DOCTYPE String PUBLIC "sailpoint.dtd" "sailpoint.dtd"> <String><?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?> <!DOCTYPE ProvisioningProject PUBLIC "sailpoint.dtd" "sailpoint.dtd"> <ProvisioningProject identity="Pat cummins"> <ExpansionItems> <ExpansionItem application="ActiveDirectory" cause="ProvisioningPolicy" name="sAMAccountName" nativeIdentity="CN=pat cummins,OU=People,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com" operation="Set" sourceInfo="ActiveDirectory" value="pat cummins"/> <ExpansionItem application="ActiveDirectory" cause="ProvisioningPolicy" name="firstName" nativeIdentity="CN=pat cummins,OU=People,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com" operation="Add" sourceInfo="ActiveDirectory" value="pat"/> <ExpansionItem application="ActiveDirectory" cause="ProvisioningPolicy" name="lastName" nativeIdentity="CN=pat cummins,OU=People,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com" operation="Add" sourceInfo="ActiveDirectory" value="cummins"/> <ExpansionItem application="ActiveDirectory" cause="ProvisioningPolicy" name="email" nativeIdentity="CN=pat cummins,OU=People,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com" operation="Add" sourceInfo="ActiveDirectory" value="pat.cummins@eshiam.com"/> <ExpansionItem application="ActiveDirectory" cause="ProvisioningPolicy" name="passWord" nativeIdentity="CN=pat cummins,OU=People,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com" operation="Add" sourceInfo="ActiveDirectory" value="Mahesh@1045"/> </ExpansionItems> <MasterPlan> <ProvisioningPlan> <AccountRequest application="ActiveDirectory" op="Create"/> </ProvisioningPlan> </MasterPlan> <ProvisioningPlan targetIntegration="ActiveDirectory" trackingId="50f8c7fc93e34253967e0df242761a1b"> <AccountRequest application="ActiveDirectory" nativeIdentity="CN=pat cummins,OU=People,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com" op="Create"> <AttributeRequest name="sAMAccountName" op="Set" value="pat cummins"/> <AttributeRequest name="firstName" op="Add" value="pat"/> <AttributeRequest name="lastName" op="Add" value="cummins"/> <AttributeRequest name="email" op="Add" value="pat.cummins@eshiam.com"/> <AttributeRequest name="passWord" op="Add" value="Mahesh@1045"/> </AccountRequest> </ProvisioningPlan> </ProvisioningProject> </String>
